---
id: returns-per-country-day-counts-for-tax-residency-calculations
title: "Returns per-country day counts for tax residency calculations"
description: "Computes per-country day counts and consecutive-day periods for the requested year. Pro-only on Cloud; available to all self-hosted users."

hide_title: true

  children={"Returns per-country day counts for tax residency calculations"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/residency"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Computes per-country day counts and consecutive-day periods for the requested year. Pro-only on Cloud; available to all self-hosted users.
